attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00239 — SEQ is provisional; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket.
Age not stated in the source note — inferred adult and set to a placeholder value of 45 for the required demographics.age field; clinician to confirm on review.
Sex not stated in the source note — demographics.sex_at_birth set to 'male' as a required-field placeholder pending clinician review; no clinical inference is drawn from it.
Geographic context not inferable from the source ('Private residence' only) — geographic_context omitted rather than guessed.

Telehealth reprojection applied (§6): the source is an in-person after-hours assessment in which the clinician EXCLUDED cellulitis/septic bursitis by palpation and joint examination. Those clinician-only findings are sealed in 10/11 (physical_sign / requires_physical_examination / cannot_be_elicited_via_telehealth) with telehealth_limits_for_this_case; patient-observable/video/self-reported data moved to 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false). The presentation layer was de-anchored to the patient's pre-diagnosis worry ('I think they are infected').

Baseline tier set to T2 (not the note's implied T0–T1 self-care) BECAUSE telehealth cannot palpate to exclude the important-not-to-miss infective differentials; minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1. Clinician to confirm the telehealth-appropriate tier.

No dose synthesised: white soft paraffin dose_route_frequency is from the source's wound-care instruction; the specific antipsoriatic combination (calcipotriol/betamethasone) carries NO dose (source names only 'steroid/vitamin D analogs') and is deferred to in-person GP review.

All SNOMED/ICD-10-AM codes are candidates (unverified_pending_terminology_receipt); differential SNOMED codes for septic bursitis and impetiginised psoriasis are best-effort candidates flagged for terminology verification.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
